detail.description:
Welcome to the new era of the legendary roguelike mobile game—Archero 2! Join the crowd in unlocking the memories of the archer!

The once-great hero has fallen into the Demon King's trap and turned into an even more powerful leader of dark forces! As a new-generation hero, you must master every skill you acquire to embark on your mission to save the world!

Game Features:
1. Roguelike Experience 2.0: Unique skill rarity settings and more chances to choose your skills!
2. Combat Experience 2.0:
detail.recentChanges:
1. New Umbral Tempest class: Diviner is coming in the new season!
2. New Legendary Mystling: Fool
3. New character skins: Violet Lotus Pulse (Nezha), Awakened Stone Monkey (Wukong)
4. Plant and Spirit build will receive major enhancements
5. All-Star Cup Qualifiers upgraded, with comprehensive optimization to both the format and rewards
6. Major Guild system upgrade, adding features such as Guild Research, pinned announcements, and recommendation mechanisms
7. Cchat system optimization
